title: oncidium reflexum
intro: Oncidium reflexum, also known as the reflexed oncidium or the twisted oncidium, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oncidium reflexum include relief from coughs, colds, and flu, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Oncidium reflexum often involve drying the roots and leaves, then using them to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
